descriptionText: M/Y H3 For Sale 2016 | GUEST CABINS: 10 | CREW CABINS:31M/Y H3 For Sale 2016 represents a rare opportunity to acquire a highly regarded 105‑metre Oceanco that has been thoughtfully updated and very well maintained. Delivered originally in 2016 and benefitting from an extensive 2023 rebuild, she is presented in good condition and combines a balanced blend of fresh design, advanced engineering and carefully considered guest features. Designed by the respected team at Reymond Langton Design, she offers a timeless and elegant aesthetic both inside and out, with a focus on comfort, functionality and contemporary styling.Specifications: • Brand: Oceanco • Year: 2016 / 2023 • Length: 105 m • Max. Beam: 14.7 m • Construction: Steel / Aluminium • Draught: 4.6 m • Gross Tonnage: 3,521 GT • Fuel Tank: 543,500 l • Water Tank: 76,400 l • Engines: 2 x MTU 7,724 HP • Guest Cabins: 10 • Crew Cabins: 31 • Max Speed: 18 knots • Range: 6,000 nm at 14 knots The exterior areas of M/Y H3 For Sale 2016 have been carefully arranged to offer a variety of inviting spaces for guests. The sun deck provides wide views and includes a bar, arranged seating and a forward‑facing whirlpool. Across the bridge, owner’s and main decks, guests can enjoy large outdoor living areas suitable for dining, relaxation and entertainment. Features include a concealable pool, generous sunbathing zones and a C‑Seed outdoor television. Forward, a touch‑and‑go helipad rated for an H155 adds convenient access for arrivals and departures.A few steps down from the main exterior spaces leads to a well‑equipped beach club. This area has been designed for easy access to the water and includes seating, dining facilities and a fold‑down swim platform that enhances the connection to the sea.Inside, M/Y H3 For Sale 2016 offers a calm atmosphere with a soft, natural colour palette and carefully selected textures. Floor‑to‑ceiling windows allow natural light to fill the salons and lounges, emphasising the sense of space onboard. An interactive video wall links the welcome lounge to the main salon, creating a modern and engaging focal point upon entry. The owner’s lounge features a comfortable seating arrangement, a formal dining area and a wine cellar. Additional amenities include a sundeck gym with forward‑facing views, as well as a lower‑deck wellness area offering a hair and beauty salon, massage room and hammam.Accommodation is arranged for up to 20 guests in 10 cabins. The forward‑facing owner’s suite includes his‑and‑hers en‑suites, walk‑in wardrobes and a private lounge space. A spacious VIP suite provides its own private lounge, deck and separate en‑suites. The remaining guest cabins consist of five double cabins and three twin cabins, offering a practical and comfortable layout for larger groups.With her combination of thoughtful design, generous spaces and up‑to‑date systems, M/Y H3 For Sale 2016 stands out as an appealing option for buyers seeking a large yacht in good condition with a strong pedigree and long‑range capability.
descriptionHtml:
M/Y H3 For Sale 2016 | GUEST CABINS: 10 | CREW CABINS:31

M/Y H3 For Sale 2016 represents a rare opportunity to acquire a highly regarded 105‑metre Oceanco that has been thoughtfully updated and very well maintained. Delivered originally in 2016 and benefitting from an extensive 2023 rebuild, she is presented in good condition and combines a balanced blend of fresh design, advanced engineering and carefully considered guest features. Designed by the respected team at Reymond Langton Design, she offers a timeless and elegant aesthetic both inside and out, with a focus on comfort, functionality and contemporary styling.

Specifications:
• Brand: Oceanco
• Year: 2016 / 2023
• Length: 105 m
• Max. Beam: 14.7 m
• Construction: Steel / Aluminium
• Draught: 4.6 m
• Gross Tonnage: 3,521 GT
• Fuel Tank: 543,500 l
• Water Tank: 76,400 l
• Engines: 2 x MTU 7,724 HP
• Guest Cabins: 10
• Crew Cabins: 31
• Max Speed: 18 knots
• Range: 6,000 nm at 14 knots 

The exterior areas of M/Y H3 For Sale 2016 have been carefully arranged to offer a variety of inviting spaces for guests. The sun deck provides wide views and includes a bar, arranged seating and a forward‑facing whirlpool. Across the bridge, owner’s and main decks, guests can enjoy large outdoor living areas suitable for dining, relaxation and entertainment. Features include a concealable pool, generous sunbathing zones and a C‑Seed outdoor television. Forward, a touch‑and‑go helipad rated for an H155 adds convenient access for arrivals and departures.

A few steps down from the main exterior spaces leads to a well‑equipped beach club. This area has been designed for easy access to the water and includes seating, dining facilities and a fold‑down swim platform that enhances the connection to the sea.

Inside, M/Y H3 For Sale 2016 offers a calm atmosphere with a soft, natural colour palette and carefully selected textures. Floor‑to‑ceiling windows allow natural light to fill the salons and lounges, emphasising the sense of space onboard. An interactive video wall links the welcome lounge to the main salon, creating a modern and engaging focal point upon entry. The owner’s lounge features a comfortable seating arrangement, a formal dining area and a wine cellar. Additional amenities include a sundeck gym with forward‑facing views, as well as a lower‑deck wellness area offering a hair and beauty salon, massage room and hammam.

Accommodation is arranged for up to 20 guests in 10 cabins. The forward‑facing owner’s suite includes his‑and‑hers en‑suites, walk‑in wardrobes and a private lounge space. A spacious VIP suite provides its own private lounge, deck and separate en‑suites. The remaining guest cabins consist of five double cabins and three twin cabins, offering a practical and comfortable layout for larger groups.

With her combination of thoughtful design, generous spaces and up‑to‑date systems, M/Y H3 For Sale 2016 stands out as an appealing option for buyers seeking a large yacht in good condition with a strong pedigree and long‑range capability.
